name: HyperX Cloud II 7.1 Channel USB Gaming Headset
highlights: Game without pain with Cloud’s comfortable memory foam ear cushions and leatherette padded headband.
Hi-Fi capable with 53mm drivers for supreme quality and immersive in-game audio
Pro-Gaming optimized with closed cup design for passive noise cancellation
TeamSpeak and Discord certified so you’ll be heard loud and clear
description: HYPERX CLOUD II at Best Price in Pakistan for RS. 24990 at Globalcomputers.pk   HyperX Cloud II Gaming Headset (Wired) The HyperX Cloud 2 was built to be an ultra-comfortable gaming headset with amazing sound. We put a lot of thought into the details of our HyperX Cloud II signature memory foam, the premium leatherette, clamping force, and weight distribution to create a headset that’s comfortable through long gaming sessions.
